supported_benchmarks.description: AI2 Reasoning Challenge science questions.
AI2 Reasoning Challenge easy split.
Commonsense completion and next-step inference.
Pronoun and commonsense reasoning with two choices.
Passage-grounded yes/no questions.
Commonsense reasoning multiple-choice questions.
Physical commonsense reasoning with two candidate solutions.
Social commonsense reasoning with three answer choices.
Elementary science questions with four options.
Truthfulness multiple-choice benchmark using MC1 targets.
Big-Bench Hard boolean expressions task.
OpenAI Graphwalks breadth-first search tasks with prompts up to 128K characters.

benchmark_suites.description: Fast sanity check with three widely used benchmarks.
Balanced default suite for serious local benchmarking.
Knowledge-heavy evaluation with factual and multiple-choice tasks.
Broad commonsense and physical/social reasoning coverage.
Math, reasoning, and BBH-style tasks.
Math-heavy benchmarking with GSM8K, Hendrycks MATH, and AIME.
Public long-context retrieval and graph reasoning benchmarks aligned with frontier reporting.
Runnable public benchmarks that map closely to recent OpenAI benchmark disclosures.
Local-only subset aligned with commonly reported public frontier benchmarks.
Broad local-only benchmark set for leaderboard-grade comparisons.
Everything implemented in the local benchmark runner.
